calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Reed appeared by zoom for and with Michael Stecher by zoom.

The court noted that Michael Stecher and Mr. Reed failed to appear at the hearing on May 13, 2024, and that an order re sanctions was issued. Mr. Reed was unable to provide an excusable reason for missing the hearing. Sanctions in the amount of $250.00 are imposed against Thomas B. Reed for failure to appear. Said sanctions are to be paid within 30-days of the order.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone/Santos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Continued To Jun-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Michael J. Stecher and the Attorney Thomas B. Reed to appear on June 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed.

An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for Attorney Thomas B. Reed to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is continued to June 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Reed, Jr. appeared by zoom for Michael Stecher (proposed executor).

Mr. Reed stated that he has nothing to add to his petition, that he believes his declaration addresses all of the issues raised by the examiner, and that he believes his petition is proper and should be granted. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 21, 2007 is admitted to probate. Michael J. Stecher is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Continued To Apr-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
